message:
test(readme): cover SeriesGroupBy rank + rank_with_pct (fd90.198 / br-971fn)

Extends readme_series_groupby_compiles_and_runs to cover the last 2
of the 15 SeriesGroupBy methods enumerated at README line 1200:

- rank("average", ascending=true, "keep")
- rank_with_pct("average", ascending=true, "keep", pct=true)

Both return a Series with one rank per input row (not per group),
asserted via len() == 6.

Found via self-review on the last 3 commits — the Series GroupBy test
covered 13 of 15 documented methods.

Verified: 34 integration tests + 7 lib tests + 2 doctests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
